wine_experiences.name: Masi Fruttaio Appassimento Experience - Monteleone21
wine_experiences.address: Via Monteleone 26, 37015 Sant'Ambrogio di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_experiences.experience_type: Fruttaio (drying loft) tour and Amarone appassimento walkthrough
wine_experiences.description: At Masi's newly opened Monteleone21 complex, guided tours take visitors through the fruttaio (drying loft) where Corvina, Rondinella, and Molinara grape bunches rest on bamboo racks for months to concentrate sugars for Amarone. Includes cellars, the Serego Alighieri possessioni, and Wine Bar 'Vino e Cucina' tasting.
wine_experiences.tip: October to December is prime fruttaio season - grapes are actively drying. In winter-spring the loft is empty but tours explain the technique in depth.

wine_experiences.name: Bertani Library Experience - Amarone Vertical 1958-2015
wine_experiences.experience_type: Vertical Amarone tasting - 45 vintages from 1958 to 2015
wine_experiences.description: Bertani's Library Experience offers guided access to an Amarone vertical from 1958 to 2015 in restored historic tasting rooms. Three selected vintages are poured in each session. Among the deepest wine-history experiences in Italy. Also available: Valpolicella Classica Experience (EUR70).
wine_experiences.tip: Schedule for Cantine Aperte weekend (late May) when Bertani opens additional vintages. The 1967 and 1980 are the benchmark bottles.

wine_experiences.name: Bike Station Valpolicella - E-Bike and Amarone Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Localita Gazzo 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella (VR), Italy
wine_experiences.experience_type: E-bike vineyard tour + Amarone cellar tasting with local food
wine_experiences.description: Tenuta Santa Maria Valverde's e-bike tour through Marano di Valpolicella Classica vineyards. Seven Fantic fat-tyre e-bikes available. Guided ride ends at the 17th-century cellar for Valpolicella, Ripasso, and Amarone tasting with local food. Gift certificates available. Rated 4.8/5.
wine_experiences.tip: The fat-tyre e-bikes handle the vineyard terrain confidently - suitable for all fitness levels including beginners.

verified.address_quoted: Localita Gazzo, 4, 37020 Marano di Valpolicella VR

wine_experiences.name: Buglioni Vendemmia (Harvest) Experience
wine_experiences.address: Via Campazzi 1, 37029 Corrubbio di San Pietro in Cariano (VR), Italy
wine_experiences.experience_type: Grape harvest experience with cellar tour and wine tasting
wine_experiences.description: The Buglioni estate offers a hands-on grape harvest experience in September and October. Participants join the harvesting of Corvina, Rondinella, and Oseleta grapes for Valpolicella and Amarone, followed by a cellar tour explaining the appassimento process and a full estate wine tasting.
wine_experiences.tip: September bookings target table grape and early Corvina harvest; October gives access to the Oseleta selection for Amarone - the rarer experience.

verified.address_quoted: Via Campazzi 1, 37029 Corrubbio di San Pietro in Cariano (VR)

wine_experiences.name: Poli Wood Experience - Barrel Tasting Masterclass
wine_experiences.experience_type: Grappa barrel tasting masterclass with aged single-varietals
wine_experiences.description: Poli Distillery's flagship Wood Experience visits the Schiavon distillery production facility, tours the historic Grappateca archive (2,000 bottles 1930s-1980s), and ends with a barrel-side tasting of aged single-varietal grappas unavailable in retail. The most educational grappa immersion in Veneto. Available Mon-Sat in five languages.
wine_experiences.tip: The Grappateca includes 1940s-era bottles showing the character of pomace from pre-DOCG grape varieties no longer planted - an unrepeatable archive.

wine_experiences.name: Zyme - Sandstone Quarry Cellar Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Via Ca del Pipa 1, 37029 San Pietro in Cariano (VR), Italy
wine_experiences.neighborhood: San Pietro in Cariano, Valpolicella Classica
wine_experiences.experience_type: Winery tour + 6-wine tasting in a sandstone quarry cellar
wine_experiences.description: Zyme winery by Celestino Gaspari is carved into a 15th-century sandstone quarry. The unique subterranean cellar is the tasting venue for 6+ wines including Valpolicella, Ripasso, and Amarone expressions. Reservation required; limited spaces fill quickly. Rated among the best winery experiences in Veneto.
wine_experiences.tip: The quarry cellar temperature stays constant year-round at around 13C - bring a layer even in summer.

verified.address_quoted: Via Ca del Pipa, 1 - 37029 San Pietro in Cariano - Localita Mattonara, Verona

wine_experiences.name: Massimago Organic Vineyard Walk and Cellar Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Via Giare 21, 37030 Mezzane di Sotto (VR), Italy
wine_experiences.experience_type: Guided organic vineyard walk + historic Amarone cellar tasting
wine_experiences.description: Massimago estate in the Mezzane Valley offers a guided walk through the historic organic vineyards followed by a visit to the old Amarone ageing cellar and tasting of Massimago's organic Valpolicella, Ripasso, and Amarone. Combine with cooking school or yoga sessions available at the relais.
wine_experiences.tip: Mezzane is an emerging sub-zone of Valpolicella not well represented on export lists - the estate tasting gives direct access to a style rarely found in wine shops.

verified.address_quoted: Via Giare, 21 37030 Mezzane di Sotto VR

wine_experiences.name: Andrea Da Ponte - Founder's Tour
wine_experiences.address: Via Primo Maggio 1, 31020 Corbanese di Tarzo (TV), Italy
wine_experiences.neighborhood: Corbanese di Tarzo, UNESCO Prosecco hills
wine_experiences.experience_type: Grappa distillery Founder's Tour with library spirits tasting
wine_experiences.description: The Founder's Tour at Distilleria Andrea Da Ponte (est. 1892) gives access to the distillery's historical archive and a tasting of library spirits not available in standard sessions. Located in the UNESCO Prosecco hills of Treviso, ideal for combining with a Prosecco wine road drive.
wine_experiences.tip: Email visite@daponte.it to specify the Founder's Tour - it opens the historical grappa archive unlike the shorter Tasting and History tours.

verified.address_quoted: Via Primo Maggio, 1 - 31020 Corbanese di Tarzo (TV)

wine_experiences.name: Prosecco Hills Vespa and Wine Tour
wine_experiences.experience_type: Vespa-ride through Prosecco DOCG hills with estate tastings
wine_experiences.description: Vespa-guided tours through the UNESCO Prosecco Superiore hills between Conegliano and Valdobbiadene. Routes wind through Cartizze, Rive single-vineyard zones, and hilltop villages. Tastings at estates along the route. Also available: e-bike variant. Operated through the Prosecco Hills tourism initiative.
wine_experiences.tip: The Cartizze sub-zone is the steepest section - request the Cartizze route for the most dramatic views and the region's highest-priced Prosecco at source.

wine_experiences.name: Grapperia Nardini sul Ponte - Historic Tasting
wine_experiences.address: Ponte Vecchio 2, 36061 Bassano del Grappa (VI), Italy
wine_experiences.experience_type: Guided distillery tour + grappa tasting flight at Italy's oldest distillery
wine_experiences.description: Guided tours of the historic 18th-century production rooms at Italy's oldest grappa distillery, ending with a tasting flight of Nardini grappas on the historic Ponte Vecchio over the Brenta River. Reserve via visite@nardini.it; Tue-Sat only. Note: multiple flights of stairs to historic rooms.
wine_experiences.tip: Request the white Grappa Nardini alongside the aged Riserva in the tasting flight - the contrast in style is the clearest argument for barrel-aged grappa.
